---
title: "STRING-GSEA Results"
metadata-files: ["_fgcz-report.yml"]
params:
  workunit_id: "unknown"
  package_dir: "."
---

```{r setup}
#| include: false
pkg_dir <- params$package_dir
wu_id <- params$workunit_id

files <- list.files(pkg_dir, recursive = TRUE)
# Exclude rendering artifacts, support files, and intermediate outputs
exclude_exact <- c("index.html", "index.qmd", "index.rmarkdown",
                   "gsea_session.yml",
                   "_fgcz-report.yml", "fgcz_header_quarto.html")
exclude_ext <- c("tsv", "txt")
files <- files[!basename(files) %in% exclude_exact]
files <- files[!tolower(tools::file_ext(files)) %in% exclude_ext]
files <- files[!grepl("^(index_files|plots|GSEA_report_files)/", files)]

classify <- function(f) {
  ext <- tolower(tools::file_ext(f))
  bn <- basename(f)
  if (bn == "GSEA_report.html") return("Report")
  if (ext == "xlsx") return("Excel")
  if (ext == "rnk") return("Rank file")
  if (ext == "png") return("Figure")
  if (ext %in% c("json", "gz")) return("Data")
  "Other"
}

file_df <- data.frame(
  File = vapply(files, function(f) {
    paste0("<a href='", f, "'>", f, "</a>")
  }, character(1)),
  Type = vapply(files, classify, character(1)),
  Size = vapply(files, function(f) {
    sz <- file.info(file.path(pkg_dir, f))$size
    if (is.na(sz)) return("")
    if (sz > 1e6) return(sprintf("%.1f MB", sz / 1e6))
    if (sz > 1e3) return(sprintf("%.0f KB", sz / 1e3))
    sprintf("%d B", sz)
  }, character(1)),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
  row.names = NULL
)

# Sort: Report first, then Excel, Figure, Data, Other
type_order <- c("Report", "Excel", "Rank file", "Figure", "Data", "Other")
file_df$Type <- factor(file_df$Type, levels = type_order)
file_df <- file_df[order(file_df$Type, file_df$File), ]
```

## Workunit `r wu_id`

```{r file-table}
#| echo: false
DT::datatable(
  file_df,
  caption = paste("Deliverables for workunit", wu_id),
  filter = "none", rownames = FALSE, escape = FALSE,
  class = "compact stripe",
  options = list(pageLength = 50, scrollX = TRUE, dom = "t")
)
```
